creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Oct 30, 2008 at 06:24:13PM +0100, Fulvio Ciriaco wrote:
> Hallo,
> shortly after submitting the port, I discovered that
> it does not work well.
> molden 4.7 compiled by me segmentation faults in many 
> situations when trying to read input files, apparently
> in libgfortran
> after
> molden.f: 3010
>       read(iun1,'(a)',end=2828,err=2828) line
> 
> Fulvio

Are you working on a fix or should I close this PR?

-- WXS
